title: CLI improvements
description: 1. Rename --compact/-c to --no-content (currently outputs compact JSON, name implies compact text — confusing, ColGrep uses -c for opposite meaning). 2. Add --context/-C N flag to control content preview lines (hardcoded at 3, ColGrep shows 6). 3. Make --threshold primary name over --min-score. 4. Add -e/--regex pre-filter flag (ColGrep parity). All in src/cli/mod.rs + output.rs.
